name: ames-community-skills
description: Third-party Claude Code skills curated by Oliver Ames that ship as bare SKILL.md files with no upstream marketplace. Currently includes humanizer (blader). SwiftUI Pro installs directly from the twostraws/SwiftUI-Agent-Skill marketplace; Apple platform dev skills converted from OpenAI's Codex plugins ship as their own top-level plugins (build-ios-apps-codex, build-macos-apps-codex).
